title: Collei's Best Enchanted Books
description: Unique and better textures for each enchanted book, easily distinguishable and raised to a modern standard.
body:
![top_header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a25c62d4b27988b94740b3da3effc3e2cf60ea5.png)
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7c7824050a2d7cda1c1d2e272fb65ada26e2812.png)
![bottom_header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4e967ced28ed68e9be57b6e72c746f792ba6d38.png)

Originally created for a small server for personal use. Now it is yours! If you'd like it.

Every enchanted book has a unique texture to help differentiate it from others and for easy organization.

Comments are turned on in Curseforge, so if any of the books could use some improvement, suggestions are welcome and appreciated!

# NO REQUIRED SUPPORT FOR 1.21.5+

Old versions with very outdated textures require one of the following:

## [OPTIFINE](https://optifine.net/downloads)
## [CIT RESEWN (FABRIC)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/versions)
## [ENCHANTED BOOK ENABLER (DATAPACK)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/enchantedbookenabler-datapack)

Thank you for checking out my pack!
